decision-tree.root-question: Does the proposed multi-agent topology show measured quality_lift_pp >= 2 vs single-agent baseline?

branch.question: Is the hand-off protocol typed (task_id + scoped context + success criteria + escalation)?

example.trace: planner→workers topology, +3pp quality, 1.4x cost (budget 2x), typed hand-off → run-the-checklist
